name: Buttermilk Cloverleaf Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and buttermilk until hot.
2. Combine with the yeast and let stand 2-3 minutes for the yeast to dissolve.
3. Stir in the baking soda, sugar, and salt.
4. Gradually stir in flour until the dough starts to leave the sides of the bowl.
5. Knead the dough on a floured work surface, adding more flour if necessary, until smooth and elastic (about 10 minutes).
6. Shape the dough into a ball and place it in a buttered bowl, turning so it is buttered all over.
7. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes.
8. Butter three 6-cup muffin tins.
9. Punch down the dough.
10. Divide into 18 portions; shape each into a ball.
11. Place 3 balls into each muffin cup.
12. Cover and let rise until double in size, about 30 minutes.
13. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
14. Brush the tops of rolls with beaten egg.
15. Bake until rolls are browned, 15-20 minutes.
